articles.title: 'Find Work In 60 Days Or Leave US': Layoffs Put Indian Techies In A Pickle
articles.description: Indians in US spend years waiting for green cards. Losing a job throws all their plans into uncertainty.

articles.title: Netravalkar, Ugarkar rip through Scotland as USA cruise to commanding win
articles.description: A target of 170 was hunted down with relative ease by USA as they won with almost 23 overs to spare

articles.title: Sonakshi Sinha, Zaheer Iqbal Join Viral ‘Melody’ Trend Inspired By PM Modi-Meloni Moment

articles.title: India slams Pakistan, calls out 'long-tainted genocidal record' at UNSC
articles.description: India called out Pakistan's "long-tainted" record of genocidal acts, telling the UN Security Council that the country's inhuman conduct reflects its attempts over decades to externalise internal failures through acts of violence within and beyond its border. Speaking at the Annual UNSC Open Debate on 'Protection of civilians in armed conflict' on Wednesday, India's Permanent Representative to the UN Ambassador Harish Parvathaneni said, "It is ironic that Pakistan, with its long-tainted record of genocidal acts, has chosen to refer to issues that are strictly internal to India." Parvathaneni's remarks came after Pakistan's representative raised the issue of Jammu and Kashmir at the debate. Raising the issue of Pakistan's strikes on Afghanistan earlier this year, he said, "The world has not forgotten that it was during the holy month of Ramadan in March this year, at a time of peace, reflection, and mercy, that Pakistan conducted a barbaric airstrike on the Omid Addiction Treatment ..

articles.title: Punjabi singer shot at point-blank range, pistols recovered: Police
articles.description: Ludhiana police arrested another suspect in Punjabi singer Inder Kaur's murder; main accused, Sukhwinder Singh, allegedly shot her after abduction.

articles.title: Sam Altman-led OpenAI may go public soon; IPO valuation could exceed $500 billion
articles.description: OpenAI may be preparing for an IPO as the ChatGPT maker expands its AI business, partnerships, and enterprise services amid growing investor interest in the artificial intelligence sector.

articles.title: Yesterday Match Result: KKR survive playoff scare as Manish Pandey, Rovman Powell seal tense chase vs MI
articles.description: The Kolkata Knight Riders pulled off a vital four-wicket victory against the Mumbai Indians, keeping their IPL playoff hopes very much alive. Chasing a modest 148, it was the sheer determination of Manish Pandey and Rovman Powell that guided them through a wobbly start and some dropped catches, ultimately sealing the crucial win.

articles.title: Severe heatwave grips Punjab, Haryana, no relief till May 26
articles.description: Rohtak and Bathinda were the hottest in the region, breaching the 46 degrees Celsius mark on Wednesday. In many places across Punjab and Haryana, maximum temperatures hovered close to 45 degrees Celsius.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel Prices Today: PM Modi’s Key Fuel Meeting Sparks Fresh Hike Fears; Check Rates in Delhi, Mumbai and More
articles.description: Fuel prices in India are under sharp focus amid concerns of another hike due to volatile global crude markets. This follows a recent Rs 3 per litre increase, the first in four years, linked to Middle East geopolitical tensions.

articles.title: This country is turning an entire airport into a Pokémon world and fans are already planning tips
articles.description: Noto Satoyama Airport is being transformed into the world's first Pokémon-themed airport, reopening as 'Noto Satoyama Pokémon With You Airport' on July 7, 2026. This initiative aims to boost tourism and spirits after the 2024 earthquake, featuring giant Pokémon displays, themed food, and exclusive merchandise until September 2029. Pokémon buses will also connect attractions across the Noto Peninsula.

articles.title: Delaying in handing over body: Kin approach charity commissioner against Jehangir Hospital
articles.description: The family alleged that the delay caused severe emotional distress and financial hardship during a time of grief

articles.title: Tamil Nadu's Vijay-led TVK govt expands cabinet, 23 MLAs to take oath as ministers today
articles.description: Twenty-three newly elected MLAs will join the Tamil Nadu State Cabinet. Governor has approved their appointments. The swearing-in ceremony is scheduled for Thursday morning in Chennai. This expansion is the second major cabinet exercise by the Vijay-led TVK government. Several MLAs from various constituencies are set to take oath.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Studio Ghibli’s cofounder Hayao Miyazaki, ‘I’ve become skeptical of the unwritten rule that just because a boy and girl appear in the same feature, a romance must ensue; rather...’ - Legendary filmmaker explains why love is not always about romance
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Hayao Miyazaki challenges the notion that all close bonds between men and women must be romantic. His films and reflections highlight that love can manifest as mutual inspiration, emotional support, and shared growth, offering a more mature understanding of human connection beyond traditional labels and expectations.

articles.title: ‘Justice Will Be Served’: White House Shares Post Claiming Trump ‘Neutralised’ America’s Enemies
articles.description: White House X post touts Trump neutralizing enemies, labels Maduro arrested, Khamenei and Abu Bilal al-Muniki killed, Raul Castro indicted, sparking online backlash over tone.

articles.title: IPL 2026: Dhoni has a sore thumb, he is not with the team: Hussey
articles.description: Michael Hussey confirms Dhoni's absence due to a sore thumb but hopes for his return in IPL 2026 playoffs.

articles.title: Caste and crisis of fraternity
articles.description: The persistence of caste supremacy, to the extent of undermining the credibility and legitimacy of institutions, such as the Supreme Court and the office of the Chief Justice of India (CJI), is a serious concern. Such incidents are symptoms of deeply rooted caste-based discrimination and marginalisation.

articles.title: Display of fees outside college now mandatory
articles.description: Fees displayed on hoardings must include all compulsory charges levied under heads such as development fees, laboratory fees, library fees and gymkhana fees, higher and technical education minister Chandrakant Patil said while speaking to reporters on Wednesday

articles.title: “What a downgrade”: FIFA World Cup 2026 anthem 'Goals' starring Lisa sparks backlash before official release
articles.description: BLACKPINK’s Lisa sparked mixed reactions after FIFA released a teaser for the 2026 World Cup anthem Goals, featuring Anitta and Rema. While critics called the song “generic” and a “mess,” supporters urged fans not to judge a 10-second clip too quickly. Despite the backlash, Lisa continues making history as the first female K-pop idol set to perform at a FIFA World Cup opening ceremony.

articles.title: JSW Motors ties up $826 million funding from India’s top bank
articles.description: JSW Motors, part of Sajjan Jindal's business empire, has secured a significant 80 billion rupee funding line. This financial boost from State Bank of India will fuel the development of a new greenfield manufacturing facility in Maharashtra. The venture aims to establish India's first homegrown new energy passenger vehicle brand in decades.

articles.title: Banks look risky, bet on EVs and innovators: Dipan Mehta on where to put your money now
articles.description: Market expert Dipan Mehta advises investors to focus on individual stocks rather than the Nifty amidst market volatility. He suggests avoiding oil marketing companies and traditional banks, instead favoring EV-focused auto ancillaries, upstream oil producers, and NBFCs. Mehta also highlights innovative companies across sectors as key opportunities for discerning investors.

articles.title: LLB students protest after result
articles.description: Lucknow University LLB Semester-I students protest flawed results; varsity adopts NEP, passes all first-semester students and promotes odd-to-even semesters.

articles.title: Lawyers intensify stir, bar assns announce 6-day work boycott
articles.description: Lawyers intensify stir, bar assns announce 6-day work boycott

articles.title: Months after tie-up with OpenAI and Anthropic, Intuit to layoff 3,000 employees; CEO says in memo: Simplifying structure will help ...
articles.description: Financial software giant Intuit is reportedly laying off nearly 17% of its global workforce, impacting around 3,000 employees. This significant restructuring, aimed at simplifying operations and boosting AI integration, follows recent partnerships with OpenAI and Anthropic. The move comes as Intuit, like other tech firms, pivots towards AI-driven efficiencies amidst broader industry layoffs.

articles.title: I-T dept awareness event on new tax laws
articles.description: Income Tax dept held “Prarambh 2026” awareness event at Lucknow University on new Income Tax Act 2025 and Rules 2026, effective April 1, 2026.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO filing lays bare losses and Elon Musk control as it stakes future on AI
articles.description: SpaceX has filed for its IPO, revealing substantial losses in its artificial intelligence division. The company's future hinges on unproven technologies like space data centers. Starlink, its satellite internet service, remains the only profitable segment. The IPO could be the largest ever, valuing SpaceX at a record amount.

articles.title: Salman Khan reveals why he got angry at media outside hospital, says, “Inki wife bahut beemar thi...” Paps apologise
articles.description: Salman Khan recently addressed the reason behind his anger towards paparazzi after a hospital visit, explaining that a close friend’s family member was seriously ill at the time. The actor spoke about the incident while attending the Raja Shivaji success party in Mumbai, where photographers also apologised to him in person.

articles.title: 9 members of gang involved in theft, sale of newborn arrested in Raebareli
articles.description: Arrests made after an investigation into abduction of an infant from at a railway station, say police

articles.title: IPL 2026 GT vs CSK Live Streaming: How to watch Gujarat vs Chennai clash live in US, Canada and UK Preview, Start Time, Venue, Squads and More
articles.description: IPL 2026 Gujarat Titans [GT] VS [CSK] Chennai Super Kings Live Streaming Channel: Gujarat Titans host Chennai Super Kings in a crucial IPL clash. GT aim to solidify their top-two playoff spot, while CSK fight to keep their fading hopes alive. Gujarat boast strong recent form and key players like Shubman Gill and Rashid Khan, while Chennai seeks a vital win to extend their season.

articles.description: Not every sound arrives sharply. Some are so soft they seem to sit just below ordinary hearing: the movement of leaves in light wind, distant conversa.

articles.description: TDP's Mahanadu on May 27-28 will introduce 19 resolutions, broadcast live to state clusters, says MLA Somireddy Chandramohan Reddy.

articles.description: HSBC and Standard Chartered signalled deeper AI-driven restructuring across the banking sector, with executives warning that technology will eliminate some roles while creating new opportunities.

articles.title: Consumer Panel Orders Hotel Mountview Refund
articles.description: The State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission Chandigarh has upheld an order directing Hotel Mountview, operated by Chandigarh Industrial and Tourism Development Corporation Limited (CITCO), to refund a portion of the booking amount paid for a cancelled marriage function. The Commission dismissed CITCO’s appeal against an earlier ruling by the District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission, which [...] The post Consumer Panel Orders Hotel Mountview Refund appeared first on Hospitality Biz India: Latest News & Analysis .
articles.source: Hospitality Biz India: Latest News & Analysis

articles.title: Interactive AI Avatar Brings Mahatma Gandhi To Life At Delhi Museum
articles.description: The Gandhi installation is the third AI powered Holobox introduced at the Sangrahalaya.

articles.title: Economic storm at home, PM making reels abroad: Opposition
articles.description: Speaking in Rae Bareli, Gandhi said the Prime Minister asked people to use less petrol, not buy gold, spend less and avoid travelling abroad.

articles.title: Search on for missing girls
articles.description: Police launch search for two missing girls from West Bengal, last seen in Vadakara on May 16, 2026.

articles.title: Jamui man kills wife over illicit affair suspicion
articles.description: In a chilling incident in Jamui, a man has been arrested after allegedly murdering his wife, Ugni Devi, by slashing her throat with a sickle amidst accusations of infidelity. The crime unfolded during a volatile argument, and the suspect remained on-site until authorities arrived. Law enforcement is delving into the domestic strife that seemingly led to this tragic act.

articles.title: Japan is facing a strange new crisis triggered by Middle East war and most people had never heard of it before
articles.description: Japan is facing growing anxiety over shortages of naphtha, a key oil-derived material used in products ranging from garbage bags and snack packaging to medical supplies, as Middle East tensions disrupt energy markets.

articles.title: R Madhavan sends legal notice to healthcare brand over alleged use of his video, calls advertisement 'fraud’
articles.description: R. Madhavan has issued a legal notice to a healthcare brand for allegedly using a clip from his interview without permission to promote their product. The actor warned fans against misleading endorsements and criticised the organisation for misusing his name and image.

articles.title: Odisha +2 Results: Check roll number wise marks at samsodisha.gov.in, re-checking dates soon
articles.description: Students who appeared for the CHSE Odisha Plus Two examinations can now access their marks online on the official portals at samsodisha.gov.in, results.odisha.gov.in and results.digilocker.gov.in.

articles.title: Big boost for RCB! Phil Salt set for return ahead of IPL 2026 playoffs
articles.description: Explosive opener Phil Salt is set to return for Royal Challengers Bengaluru ahead of the IPL 2026 playoffs after recovering from a finger injury. His return provides a significant boost to RCB's strong top-order, which struggled in his absence.

articles.title: MHT CET Answer Key 2026 Released At cetcell.mahacet.org, Raise Objection By May 22
articles.description: MHT CET Answer Key 2026: The authorities will review objections and the final MHT CET 2026 answer key PDF and the result will be released accordingly.

articles.title: Kerala Cabinet portfolios: Revenue for Anilkumar, Excise for Liju, Electricity for Sunny Joseph
articles.description: Official portfolio allocation for the V.D. Satheesan-led Kerala Cabinet has been notified. Check the complete list of ministers and their assigned departments, including Home, Finance, and Revenue.

articles.title: PM busy ‘handing out toffee’ while ‘economic storm is raging’: Rahul Gandhi slams Modi over ‘Melodi’ moment
articles.description: Taking a dig at the viral moment, Rahul Gandhi said that an “economic storm is raging” in the country while the PM was “busy handing out toffee in Italy”.

articles.title: Neutral Zydus LifeSciences; target of Rs 1080: Motilal Oswal
'What is wrong with it?' On caste census, SC says govt should know number of people in backward class
articles.description: The Supreme Court has upheld the Centre's decision to conduct caste enumeration in the upcoming 2027 Census, stating there is "nothing wrong with it." A bench led by the Chief Justice emphasized that such data is crucial for the government to identify backward classes and implement effective welfare measures. This marks the first comprehensive caste count since 1931.

articles.title: Pharmacy strike shuts thousands of medical stores in Hyderabad on May 20, leaves patients searching for medicines
articles.description: A nationwide pharmacy strike leads to closure of medical shops in Hyderabad forcing patients to hunt for medicines as thousands of stores remain closed.
